title: Compression
description: Adds compressed blocks that can save space
body:
#
❗ ATTENTION ❗ ###
If you are updating the mod from version 1.2 to 1.3+, be sure to replace all compressed blocks with regular ones. The mod has been completely rebuilt from scratch, and compressed blocks from the older version will not work (they will disappear).
​

📦Compression: Compress Blocks to Save Space!📦

​Compressium is a modification that allows you to compress your blocks to save valuable space in your inventory and storage systems. No more dozens of chests filled with stone or cobblestone – now you can have your entire supply in one small stack!

​How Does It Work?

Simply combine 9 of the same blocks on a crafting table to get one compressed block. Instead of 9 slots, it only takes up one! And the best part is, you can compress it even further! Of course, you can reverse this process. ### Features: ​**Multiple Compression Levels**: x9, x81, x729, x6561 and x59049 compression levels are available. **Additions**: Each block is more resistant to explosions depending on its original hardness, some blocks, such as sand or gravel, have gravity, coal has a specific fuel value in a furnace, etc. ### ​Available Blocks for Compression (71): - Stones - Minerals - Sands - Planks - Logs - Other like Glass - Items ### Suggestions? Join my Discord server - [**Link**](https://discord.gg/G3TvUw5AVg) ### License: This mod is licensed under **CC BY-NC-SA 4.0**. You can use it in your modpacks! ##
